name: Justice Is Mine
overview: Upright and incorruptible Judge Chun Yue is forced to cover up the truth after his son causes a hit-and-run that injures the son of a notorious gang leader. Seeking vengeance for his son's injuries, the ruthless crime boss unleashes a wave of bloodshed across the city. Meanwhile, determined police officer Tong Huen remains resolute in her pursuit of justice, relentlessly chasing the truth behind the web of corruption and revenge.
